--- title: "[rmst_diff()]{.doc-object-name .doc-function .doc-label .doc-label-function}" body-classes: doc-api-page page-navigation: false html-table-processing: none --- ::: {.doc-subject} Compute the RMST difference between two groups and return a tidy DataFrame. ::: ::: {.doc-usage-source} Usage [Source](https://github.com/rich-iannone/greenwood/blob/main/greenwood/_rmst.py#L483-L547){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} ::: ::: {.doc-signature .doc-Kind.FUNCTION} ```python rmst_diff(surv, tau, group, *, strata=None, conf_level=0.95) ``` ::: ::: {.doc-text} A convenience wrapper around `rmst_test()` with `estimand="difference"` that returns the result as a single-row DataFrame rather than an `RMSTResult` object. This is useful when you want to feed the comparison directly into a summary table or pipeline. ::: ## Parameters {.doc-parameters} ::: {.doc-definition-items} [surv]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [Surv]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : A right-censored `Surv` response built with `Surv.right()`. [tau]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : The restriction time. Should be a clinically meaningful horizon (e.g., 365 days for one-year RMST). [group]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [Any]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : Group labels, one per observation. Must have exactly two unique levels. [strata]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [Any | None]{.doc-parameter-annotation} [=]{.doc-parameter-default-sep .op} [None]{.doc-parameter-default} : Stratification variable for stratified RMST comparison. If provided, per-group RMST estimates are computed within each stratum and pooled with inverse-variance weights. [conf_level]{.doc-parameter-name}[:]{.doc-parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.doc-parameter-annotation} [=]{.doc-parameter-default-sep .op} [[0.95]{.fl}]{.doc-parameter-default} : Confidence level for the confidence interval (default `0.95`). ::: ## Returns {.doc-returns} ::: {.doc-definition-items} [DataFrame]{.doc-parameter-annotation} : A single-row DataFrame with columns `group1`, `group2`, `rmst1`, `rmst2`, `difference`, `se`, `lower_ci`, `upper_ci`, `statistic`, and `p_value`. ::: ## Examples {.doc-examples} Compute the one-year RMST difference between sexes in the lung cancer dataset: ::: {#c92438bf .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import greenwood as gw lung = gw.load_dataset("lung", backend="polars") y = gw.Surv.right(lung["time"], event=(lung["status"] == 2)) gw.rmst_diff(y, tau=365, group=lung["sex"]) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=1} ```{=html}
shape: (1, 10)

``` ::: :::
